title: Micron Technology Inc (MU) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Micron Technology reported exceptional Q1 2026 financial results, significantly exceeding analyst expectations. The company achieved total revenue of $13.6 billion, representing a 21% sequential increase and 57% year-over-year growth. Key Financial Metrics: DRAM revenue reached $10.8 billion (69% YoY growth), NAND revenue grew to $2.7 billion (22% YoY increase), Gross margin expanded to 56.8%, up 11 percentage points sequentially, Operating margin stood at 47%, Non-GAAP EPS increased 58% sequentially to $4.78. Business Segment Performance: Cloud Memory generated $5.3 billion (39% of revenue), Core Data Center contributed $2.4 billion (17%), Mobile and Client revenue totaled $4.3 billion (31%), Automotive/Embedded reached $1.7 billion (13%). Forward Guidance: Management projected Q2 revenue of $18.7 billion and EPS of $8.42 per share, with gross margins expected at 68%. CEO Sanjay Mehrotra emphasized that we have completed agreements on price and volume for entire calendar 2026 HBM supply. Despite strong demand, Micron faces supply constraints limiting fulfillment capacity. Capital expenditures are increasing to $20 billion to support HBM manufacturing, with tight market conditions expected through 2026.
